meta.title: Fayed | My Journey
meta.description: A calm patient journey home that helps you know what to do next.

hero.title: A calm place to see what matters next
hero.note: This screen brings together your next session, payment follow-up, support status, and recent care activity in one simple view.

chips.pendingPayment: A payment still needs your attention
chips.supportOpen: Support is following up with you

instantBooking.heading: Pending instant booking request
instantBooking.note: A request with {practitioner} is still active.

empty.heading: Nothing urgent right now
empty.note: When there is something that needs your attention, it will appear here.

recent.heading: Recent activity
recent.note: A short view of your care activity, so you can pick up where you left off.

empty.heading: Your recent activity will appear here
empty.note: Once you book sessions, complete check-ins, or make payments, this area will help you return to them quickly.

support.heading: Support
support.openTicket: You still have an open support ticket connected to your account.
support.empty: If you need help, you can still reach support from your current patient area.

quickLinks.careNote: Start from the action that helps you move forward with a little less effort.
quickLinks.utilityNote: Keep practical tools nearby without letting them take over the whole journey.

nextSteps.unavailable: This next step is part of your journey, but its dedicated web screen is not ready yet.

COMPLETE_PAYMENT.title: Complete your pending payment
COMPLETE_PAYMENT.note: Finish this payment so your care plan can continue without interruption.

JOIN_UPCOMING_SESSION.title: Get ready for your upcoming session
JOIN_UPCOMING_SESSION.note: Open your session details to review the time and current status. A direct join flow is not available on the web yet.

VIEW_SUPPORT_TICKET.title: Check your support follow-up
VIEW_SUPPORT_TICKET.note: Support still has an open ticket linked to your account.

TAKE_ASSESSMENT.title: Start a quick check-in
TAKE_ASSESSMENT.note: A short check-in can help you understand your current needs before the next step.

START_GUIDED_MATCHING.title: Start guided matching
START_GUIDED_MATCHING.note: Guided matching can help you move toward a suitable practitioner.

BOOK_NEXT_SESSION.title: Book your next session
BOOK_NEXT_SESSION.note: Explore practitioners and choose the next session that fits your journey.

error.heading: We could not load your journey right now
error.note: Please try again. Your sessions and payments are still available from the patient navigation.
